description: Achieve 100% feature parity with Vant Web for ALL 93 components. Each component must match Vant's Props, Events, Animations, CSS Variables, Slots, and Composables.

rules: Read VANT_ACCEPTANCE.md first - it defines the acceptance criteria
Each story must achieve 100% feature parity, not just 'critical gaps'
Props: ALL Vant props must be supported (or documented as N/A with reason in README)
Events: ALL events with correct timing (opened/closed AFTER animation)
Animations: Vue Transition + slide/fade CSS animations where Vant has them
CSS Variables: No hardcoded values, use --van-* variables in index.less
Slots: ALL slots must be supported
Composables: Implement useLockScroll, useLazyRender, useGlobalZIndex where needed
If a feature cannot be supported in Lynx, document WHY in component README '与 Vant 的差异' section
Use lynxbase skill to query Lynx APIs for alternatives
Remove the parity report comment block after achieving full parity
parityChecklist: 1. Fetch Vant source: curl {component}.tsx (or .ts), shared.ts (if exists), index.less, types.ts from GitHub
2. Props: List ALL props from Vant source, implement each one
3. Events: List ALL events from emits array, ensure correct timing
4. Animations: Implement Vue <Transition> where Vant uses it
5. CSS Variables: Create/update index.less with all --van-{component}-* variables from Vant
6. Slots: Support all slots from Vant
7. Composables: Use or implement required composables
8. Sub-components: Integrate Icon, Loading, Badge etc. where Vant does
9. Browser verify: Test all props/events work correctly
10. Update README.md: Document any Lynx limitations
11. File structure: Ensure types.ts, index.less exist if Vant has them
